# terrible_ansible_windows_win_whoami (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name竊致alue).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `account` (String) The running account SID details.
- `authentication_package` (String) The name of the authentication package used to authenticate the user in the session.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `dns_domain_name` (String) The DNS name of the logon session, this is an empty string if this is not set.
- `groups` (String) A list of groups and attributes that the user is a member of.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `impersonation_level` (String) The impersonation level of the token, only valid if `token_type` is `TokenImpersonation`, see https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/windows/desktop/aa379572.aspx.
- `label` (String) The mandatory label set to the logon session.
- `login_domain` (String) The name of the domain used to authenticate the owner of the session.
- `login_time` (String) The logon time in ISO 8601 format
- `logon_id` (Number) The unique identifier of the logon session.
- `logon_server` (String) The name of the server used to authenticate the owner of the logon session.
- `logon_type` (String) The logon type that identifies the logon method, see https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/windows/desktop/aa380129.aspx.
- `privileges` (String) A dictionary of privileges and their state on the logon token.
- `rights` (String) A list of logon rights assigned to the logon.
- `token_type` (String) The token type to indicate whether it is a primary or impersonation token.
- `upn` (String) The user principal name of the current user.
- `user_flags` (String) The user flags for the logon session, see UserFlags in https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/windows/desktop/aa380128.
